analytics.title: Print Analytics
analytics.noDataHint: Print analytics data will be collected automatically. Please check back after a few days.
analytics.counterHint: No page increase detected in selected period; cards are showing latest device counters.

statusDashboard.title: Print Service Status Dashboard
statusDashboard.addPrintersHint: Please add printers in the configuration tab.

printServerMonitoring.title: Print Server Monitoring
printServerMonitoring.noServers: No print servers configured. Add servers in the Devices Management tab.

alertSettings.title: Alert Settings
alertSettings.senderHelperAddressBook: Select from address book or type manually
alertSettings.senderHelperConfigure: Configure senders in System Settings → SMTP Email Settings
alertSettings.recipientHelperAddressBook: Select from address book or type and press Enter
alertSettings.recipientHelperConfigure: Configure recipients in System Settings → SMTP Email Settings
alertSettings.tonerThresholdHelper: Alert when toner drops below this level
alertSettings.offlineRule1: Immediately when a printer goes offline
alertSettings.offlineRule4: Immediately when a printer comes back online (recovery)
alertSettings.faultRule1: Alert when printer reports Paper Jam
alertSettings.faultRule2: Alert when printer reports No Paper
alertSettings.faultRule3: Alert when printer reports Door Open
alertSettings.tonerRule1: Immediately when any toner drops below {{threshold}}%
alertSettings.tonerRule2: Repeat every 24 hours while toner remains low
alertSettings.tonerRule3: Stop alerting when toner is refilled above {{threshold}}%
alertSettings.serverRule1: Alert after 2 consecutive ping failures (1 minute)
alertSettings.serverRule2: Cooldown: 5 minutes between alerts per server
alertSettings.serverRule3: Recovery notification when server comes back online
alertSettings.testDescription: Send test emails to verify your SMTP configuration. Make sure to save your settings first.
alertSettings.enableTestingHint: Please fill in sender and recipient emails to enable testing.

reportForm.title: Generate Printer Status Report
reportForm.instruction: Click the buttons below to generate the printer status report.
reportForm.scheduleDescription: Configure a recurring weekly schedule. The report will be generated and sent automatically using the email addresses above.
reportForm.errorInvalidSender: Please enter a valid sender email
reportForm.errorInvalidRecipient: Please enter a valid recipient email
reportForm.errorInvalidCc: Please enter a valid CC email
reportForm.successSent: Weekly report has been successfully generated and sent!

jiraTickets.title: Jira Tickets
jiraTickets.subtitle: ISDS ticket quick creation and management

config.description: Configure your Jira Server URL and Personal Access Token (PAT). Each user must configure their own credentials to use Jira features.
config.optionalField: Optional - uses system default if empty
config.tokenMaskedHint: Leave empty to keep existing token unchanged
config.urlAndPatRequired: Server URL and API Token are required
config.notConfiguredWarning: Jira is not configured. Please go to Configuration to set up your Jira Server and API Token.

create.summaryLabel: Ticket Summary (template default is prefilled and editable)
create.reporterLabel: Reporter (press Enter or comma to confirm)
create.descriptionHelp: Variables like {floor}, {DATE_COMPACT} will be auto-replaced on submit
create.noResolveAction: No Resolve action available for this ticket
create.noCloseAction: No Close action available for this ticket
create.assigneeSkipped: Warning: failed to set assignee (Jira default assignment applied)

manage.searchError: Ticket does not exist or permission denied
manage.pendingApprovalPanelTitle: Tickets Awaiting My Approval (auto-refreshes every 30 seconds, uses the same date range as above)
manage.noActions: No available actions (ticket may already be closed)

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Deletion
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this template? This action cannot be undone.

commentDialog.title: Add Comment - {{key}}
commentDialog.noTemplates: No templates yet. Add one below.

userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.adminOnly: Only administrators can access user management features
userManagement.forgotPasswordDescription: Configure the sender email address used when users request a password reset.
userManagement.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{username}}"? This action cannot be undone.
userManagement.adminDesc: Administrator: Can access and operate all system functions (including full Jira ticket capabilities)
userManagement.editorDesc: Editor: Can operate printer management, status monitoring, report generation, Asset Inventory, and full Jira ticket capabilities
userManagement.viewerDesc: Viewer: Can view printer management, status monitoring, Asset Inventory, and has full Jira ticket access

settingsPanel.title: System Settings
settingsPanel.emailAddressBookDescription: Pre-configure email addresses here. They will be available as quick-select options in Report Generation and Alert Settings.
settingsPanel.maxSnapshotsHint: Maximum {{max}} snapshots allowed, oldest will be automatically deleted
settingsPanel.snapshotsInclude: Snapshots include: system settings, user management, alert configuration, printer configurations, and print servers
settingsPanel.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore to this snapshot state? This will overwrite current system settings, users, and alert configuration.
settingsPanel.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this snapshot? This operation cannot be undone.
settingsPanel.updateHint: Upload the offline deployment package (.zip) to update the system. After installation, click "Restart Service" to apply backend changes. Frontend changes take effect immediately.
settingsPanel.monitoringTuningDesc: Tune monitoring intervals and backoff behavior. Changes are hot-applied after save.

printerManagement.title: Printer Management
printerManagement.noPrintersYet: No printers configured yet, please add
printerManagement.enableMaintenanceTooltip: Enable to pause monitoring for this printer
printerManagement.maintenanceDescription: Enable to pause monitoring, hide from dashboard and reports
printerManagement.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this printer?
printerManagement.ipInvalid: Please enter a valid IP address
printerManagement.portInvalid: Please enter a valid port number (1-65535)
printerManagement.noServersClickAdd: No print servers configured. Click "Add Server" to add one.
printerManagement.maintenanceTooltipServer: Enable to pause monitoring for this server

loginPage.registerDescription: Create a new account to use system features
loginPage.loginDescription: Please enter username and password to login
loginPage.loginFailed: Login failed, please check username and password
loginPage.fillAllFields: Please fill in all required fields
loginPage.passwordMismatch: The two password entries do not match
loginPage.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long
loginPage.resetEmailSent: Password reset email has been sent
